name: BPC-157
mechanism: Gastric pentadecapeptide that promotes angiogenesis, tendon and ligament healing, and gut repair
shortDescription: The most popular recovery peptide. Strong animal study data for tendon, ligament, and gut healing. Human clinical data is limited but growing.

keyData.primaryUse: Injury recovery, gut healing, tendon repair
keyData.evidenceBase: Extensive animal studies, limited human trials
